name: high-stakes
description: Produce a reliable, high-stakes-grade result for any task by treating the work as guilty until independent skeptics fail to break it — runs a dynamic many-subagent adversarial-verification Workflow that hunts ten specific failure modes (silent assumptions, hidden inconsistencies, sycophancy, subtle conceptual errors, overcomplication, dead code, orthogonal damage, and more) and loops until two consecutive clean rounds
